text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I drop by Nakayama<n>Racecourse and
spot a pair of familiar<n>faces.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see... So what would you say<n>Nakayama
Racecourse means to<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's a place I always dreamed<n>of, and one
my grandmother held<n>fondly in her memories.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Didn't see you there.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Actually, I've received requests fromquite a few outlets, not just TwinkleMonthly.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I have an interview with Turbo TurfWEB in eight minutes, then TheNakayama Sleuth twenty-fiveminutes after that, and in fifty minutes, um...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Not at all! It's the least I can do.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
The students are working so hard. I<n>have to do my
part to make our next<n>concert even bigger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can see the determination in her<n>eyes.
choice_data_list: I'll go get you something to drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can see the determination in her<n>eyes.
choice_data_list: I'll go get you something to drink.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, no, you really don't have to! I<n>can get
something myse—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice sounds hoarse. It must be<n>worn out
after so many interviews.
choice_data_list: I'll pick up some cough drops while I'm at it.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? Hi, I'm with Turbo Turf<n>WEB...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Oh, y-yes! I'm Light Hello! Pleased to<n>meet you.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: And, um, Trainer? I really appreciate<n>the help!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'll return the favor someday! Okay,<n>gotta run now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, an extravagant box of<n>sweets is
delivered to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Written on the wrapping paper in neat<n>letters are
my and<n><chrname>'s names along<n>with
a big "Thank you!"

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, are you sure? Aren't you off<n>today?
choice_data_list: I want to do my part to help them shine too.
I want to do my part to help them shine too.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Right, how could I forget? You know<n>the girls far
better than me!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? I'm with Turbo Turf... got<n>here a little
early.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's quite all right! We can get right<n>to the
interview!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: And Trainer, thank you for offering to<n>help out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello and I sit for an interview<n>with the
reporter.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...I had no idea it would take so long.<n>Sorry to eat
up so much of your time.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I was really impressed with how<n>in-depth your
answers were, though. I<n>guess it only makes
sense, given<n>how much time you spend with the
students.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...I need to step up my game!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'll learn from your answers and use<n>them in my
interviews tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Yes! I want to do everything I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The passion and persistence Light<n>Hello
demonstrates in her work<n>continues to amaze
me...
